subcodes.first_line: O thou dear maidservant of God! ...I am very happy that thy marriage did not distract thee, for indeed, thou didst become more self-sacrificing and hast made progress.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی آنچه بتاریخ ۲۹ نوفمبر سنه ۱۹۰۴ مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @consolation and comfort
